testcase.name: test_remove_team_validation
testcase.error: backend/tests/test_pm_team_assign.py:24: in setup assert login_res.status_code == 200, f"PM login failed: {login_res.text}" E AssertionError: PM login failed: {"detail":"Too many login attempts. Please wait a minute."} E assert 429 == 200 E + where 429 = <Response [429]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_super_admin_can_access_pm_endpoints
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_pm_team_assign.py:200: in test_super_admin_can_access_pm_endpoints assert login_res.status_code == 200, f"Admin login failed: {login_res.text}" E AssertionError: Admin login failed: {"detail":"Too many login attempts. Please wait a minute."} E assert 429 == 200 E + where 429 = <Response [429]>.status_code

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_pm_team_assign.py:219: in test_get_project_team assert login_res.status_code == 200 E assert 429 == 200 E + where 429 = <Response [429]>.status_code
